flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Central Arizona College fell 12% between 2009 and 2010 (38.4% → 33.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Arizona College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Central Arizona College rose 63% between 2007 and 2010 (20.8% → 33.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Central Arizona College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.6k → $2.2k).
